[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 101010011 5
1 010010100 3
2 010101101 5
3 001110011 5
4 011001101 5
5 000111110 5
6 000111111 6
7 011011001 5

12 21 100010101 4
23 32 110111000 5
34 43 111001011 6
45 54 100000110 3
56 65 100111000 4
67 76 100000111 4
70 07 111011110 7

02 20 010010100 3 match 1
13 31 010101101 5 match 2
24 42 001110011 5 match 3
35 53 011001101 5 match 4
46 64 000111110 5 match 5
57 75 000111111 6 match 6
60 06 011011001 5 match 7
71 17 001011111 6

36 63 111110101 7
47 74 100111001 5
50 05 111100001 5
61 16 101011000 4
72 27 101001010 4

26 62 001001101 4
37 73 011110010 5
